[Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/deluxe-outdoor-banner-retractor) 5. Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor Replacement Banner # Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor Replacement Banner Do you need to update the content on your Deluxe Outdoor Banner Retractor? Get started on your replacement for your retractor below. You can customize it for any occasion or location. We have lots of templates available for you to use. You can edit the banner template in the online designer by adding clip art, photos, text, and a background. * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Order Process](#67c5acd7-3439-4968-a15d-3062ce7ef596) * [Shipping](#f133dd02-bd23-465c-b7bd-54cc177aaaa2) * [Production Times](#23dcacdf-8499-4b46-bb98-90743a37a906) Step 1 - Choose Size and Quantity ## Choose Size Choose the size you want for your product Size (H x W): 78" x 33" 78" x 33" Qty: Step 2 - Choose Add-Ons ## Choose Options Choose the options you want for your product ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Step 3 - Choose Design Method ## Pick a Template All Templates Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ ### Three Ways to Order Replacements Material There are three ways you can order vinyl replacements online. 1. Pick a Template to Customize * Add a background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics 2. Upload a File * Visit our [artwork specification page](https://www.banners.com/artwork-specs) for our complete artwork guidelines 3. Let us Design * We have a team of graphic designers who can design a custom vinyl replacement for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us ### Payment Information All vinyl banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html) If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative for your options. We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order. Please note we have a minimum order of $35.00 in product. [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Shipping Information This Product will be produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications. Please specify which shipping method you would like when you place your order. We offer a 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. [Visit our shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our standard and oversized vinyl banner shipping times. If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service prior to ordering. Phone: 320-391-5300 We offer the following shipping methods: * Economy (5-10 Business Days) * Standard (3-5 Business Days) *
